subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of revelation, attained unto the days of God, the Lord of all worlds, and turned unto the Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق الوحی و فاز بایام الله رب العالمین و توجه الی الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
